creator: freebsd@mnd.sc
text:
(In reply to Sergey A. Osokin from comment #7)

I can try to reduce the number to those that are actually used (there are some dynamic modules that are not loaded in the current configuration), but that server is hosting some live sites, so I'd prefer not do a truly minimal build there. However, I could do a debug build and try to see where exactly it is crashing.
